title: helichrysum dasycephalum
intro: Helichrysum dasycephalum, also known as Yellow Everlasting, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Australia and South Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for wound care and skin issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, which provide various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Helichrysum dasycephalum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or used in tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
